commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Therefore thus says the Lord GOD; Behold, I will stretch out my hand upon the Philistines, and I will cut off the Cherethites, and destroy the remnant of the seacoast. Hebrew, "Ceretheans. "David's guards were of this nation, 2 Kings viii. They came originally from Crete; and the Septuagint have here, "Cretans "(Calmet) as Grabe substitutes for "Judges of Sidon. "(Haydock) Chaldean, "archers. They deserve not the name of a nation, having been much reduced by Egypt and the Chaldeans.
